allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca listcas 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca init --help 2>&1 | head -60)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca init --help 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "certprofile\\|signedby\\|tokenType")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca listprofiles --type cert 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca editcertificateprofile --help 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ra addendentity --help 2>&1 | head -60)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca exportprofiles --help 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca importprofiles --help 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca editcertificateprofile ENDUSER -listFields 2>&1 | head -80)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ca editcertificateprofile ENDUSER -listFields 2>&1 | grep -i "validity\\|keyUsage\\|type\\|caIssuers\\|ocsp\\|crl\\|nonRepudiation\\|digitalSignature" | head -20)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver which softhsm2-util 2>&1 || echo "softhsm2 not installed" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver ls /usr/lib/softhsm/ 2>&1 || echo "no softhsm lib")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint cat keyfactor/signserver-ce:latest /etc/os-release 2>&1 | head -10)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint sh keyfactor/signserver-ce:latest -c "which yum microdnf rpm 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/bin/*dnf* /usr/bin/*yum* /usr/bin/*rpm* 2>/dev/null || echo 'nothing found'; ls /usr/sbin/microdnf 2>/dev/null || true" 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver softhsm2-util --version 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver ls -la /usr/lib64/pkcs11/libsofthsm2.so 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver softhsm2-util --version 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver softhsm2-util --show-slots 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver ls -la /usr/lib64/pkcs11/libsofthsm2.so 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec --user root ivf-signserver bash -c "
chown -R 10001:root /opt/keyfactor/persistent/softhsm/ &&
chmod -R 755 /opt/keyfactor/persistent/softhsm/
" 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver softhsm2-util --show-slots 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver find / -name "signserver-deploy-configuration*.properties" 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "---" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver cat /opt/signserver/res/deploytools/signserver_deploy.properties 2>/dev/null | grep -i "sharedlib\\|pkcs11\\|softhsm\\|p11" || echo "no deploy props" && echo "---" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver find / -name "*pkcs11*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver cat /opt/keyfactor/signserver/conf/signserver_deploy.properties 2>&1 | grep -i "p11\\|pkcs11\\|sharedlib\\|softhsm" || echo "No PKCS#11 config found")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver which pkcs11-tool 2>&1 && echo "found" || echo "not found" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver pkcs11-tool --version 2>&1)
